title: Trump Tries to Sidestep Blame for Any Civilian Deaths in Iran
summary_full: The president and the Pentagon have cast blame on Iran for the mounting toll. More than 1,800 people have died in the war, including many civilians.
summary_public: The president and the Pentagon have cast blame on Iran for the mounting toll. More than 1,800 people have died in the war, including many civilians.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump Tries to Sidestep Blame for Any Civilian Deaths in Iran
